productDisplayName: Homme Men Black Semi Formal Shoes
description: Referencing sturdy and comfy driving shoes, this well-heeled pair from homme is perfect for a dressy casual or toned down semi formal vibe. Style this with tonal accessories.UpperBlunt toe cup with a leather upperElasticated inserts on the sides of the tongueReinforced overlay at the heelStitch detail on the toe boxLeather liningPadded footbedOutsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heel and waffle shaped lugs for gripshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a leather brush to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
